scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build:preview && bash ../../../../private/avalsys-suite/scripts/wrangler-account.sh deploy --config wrangler.preview.jsonc
scripts.deploy:production: bun run build:production && bash ../../../../private/avalsys-suite/scripts/wrangler-account.sh deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.deploy:preview:dry-run: bun run build:preview && bash ../../../../private/avalsys-suite/scripts/wrangler-account.sh deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.preview.jsonc
scripts.deploy:production:dry-run: bun run build:production && bash ../../../../private/avalsys-suite/scripts/wrangler-account.sh deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.production.jsonc
